rationale: Both notes indicate close conceptual/method overlap: the citing paper estimates a structural retail entry game with strategic interactions/multiple equilibria, and the cited paper develops and estimates a strategic market-structure entry/format game in discount retail with endogenous-structure correction. Given this strong alignment with the citing paper’s stated extension of prior empirical entry-game work, this is plausibly a substantive methodological/foundational citation rather than an incidental mention.
